category_sources: source_facts.description identifies vgt as a tool for visualising Go tests.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides vgt; source_facts.homepage points to the official vgt GitHub repository.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; its README is the best official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/roblaszczak/vgt, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states Visualising Go Tests; source_facts.executables lists vgt as a CLI executable.
